summary: Comprehensive testing of POQ Survey Platform new features completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (19/19 tests passed). Frontend participant flow works correctly with new condition selection step. Dashboard shows Condition column. Minor frontend bug found with duplicate email error handling.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate email error shows 'Unable to connect to server' instead of 'Email already registered'. Console shows 'TypeError: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read'. The API correctly returns the error but frontend catch block is triggered.

passed_tests: Backend: API root and health endpoints
Backend: Participant registration with unique email
Backend: Duplicate email returns 'Email already registered' (400)
Backend: Consent requirement enforced
Backend: Condition assignment (1-5) works correctly
Backend: Invalid conditions (0, 6) rejected with 422
Backend: Non-existent participant returns 404 for condition assignment
Backend: Survey response save and retrieval
Backend: Session create and end
Backend: Investigator authentication
Backend: Dashboard stats, participants, responses, scores endpoints
Backend: Participants endpoint returns assigned_condition field
Backend: Full participant flow (register -> condition -> survey -> complete)
Frontend: Consent form loads and works
Frontend: Registration form works
Frontend: Condition selection page shows all 5 conditions with radio buttons
Frontend: Condition selection saves to DB via PUT endpoint
Frontend: Survey page shows instructions table with 5 conditions
Frontend: Dashboard participants table shows Condition column
Frontend: Investigator login and password change works
action_items: Fix RegistrationForm error handling - the catch block is being triggered even when API returns 400 with proper error message. The response body appears to be read twice causing 'body stream already read' error. Check if there's any middleware or interceptor reading the response.
critical_code_review_comments: Login component (line 409) shows 'Connection error' for catch block but should show the actual API error message for 401 responses
Console warnings about HTML nesting (th inside span, tr inside span) in Dashboard table - these are from Emergent's instrumentation and don't affect functionality

platform_designer.password: Unknown - was changed in previous session

seed_data_creation: Multiple test participants created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (condition selection, instructions table, dashboard condition column) are working correctly. The only issue is a frontend error handling bug where duplicate email registration shows generic error instead of specific 'Email already registered' message. Backend API returns correct error. Primary investigator password was changed to 'NewSecurePass123!' during testing.

features_verified.condition_selection_page: PASS - All 5 conditions displayed with radio buttons, selection saves to DB
features_verified.instructions_table_on_survey: PASS - Table with 5 conditions shown above survey questions
features_verified.dashboard_condition_column: PASS - Condition column shows assigned condition number or '-'
features_verified.put_condition_endpoint: PASS - Returns success with valid condition (1-5), rejects invalid
features_verified.duplicate_email_error: PARTIAL - API returns correct error, frontend shows generic message
